narrative:
Goshen Township L (precinct in Clermont County) has 941 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.1 percentage points.
